title: Computer Science Basics
description: Fundamental concepts of computer science including algorithms, data structures, and programming.
subject: Technology

questions.explanation: CPU stands for Central Processing Unit — the primary component of a computer that executes instructions.

questions.prompt: What is the time complexity of binary search on a sorted array?
questions.explanation: Binary search repeatedly halves the search space, giving O(log n) time complexity.

questions.prompt: Which data structure operates on a Last-In, First-Out (LIFO) principle?
questions.explanation: A stack follows LIFO — the last element pushed is the first one popped, like a stack of plates.

questions.prompt: In binary, what is the decimal value of 1010?

questions.explanation: HTML stands for HyperText Markup Language — the standard language for creating web pages.

questions.prompt: Which sorting algorithm has the best average-case time complexity?
questions.explanation: Quick Sort has an average-case time complexity of O(n log n), making it one of the fastest practical sorting algorithms.
